(B3C) Staff Names/Faces CHAR 1 Cognitive patterns: memory/recall ability - staff names/faces. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
127 B3D B3D_IN_HOME (B3D) That He/She is in Nursing Home CHAR 1 Cognitive patterns: memory/recall ability - that he/she is in nursing home. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
128 B3E B3E_NONE_ABOVE (B3E) None of Above are Recalled CHAR 1 Cognitive patterns: memory/recall ability - none of above 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
129 B4
